intentAndPurpose.intent: Windowed pagination indicator for carousels and multi-page content. Shows a fixed window of dots that scroll with the active index. Edge dots shrink to signal more content on either side. Supports loop (infinite) and non-loop (end-grow) modes. Fully accessible: roving tabindex, keyboard nav, aria-selected.

props.name: count
props.description: Total number of pages / items. Required.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent appearance role. `auto` resolves to `primary`. Default: `primary`.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the tablist root.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name applied to the root.

props.name: loop
props.description: Loop mode. `true` = infinite windowed scroll, window always centered on active, last → 0 wraps seamlessly. `false` = finite sequence, window clamps at the edges, last dot grows full size when the user approaches the end. Default: `false`.

props.name: onActiveIndexChange
props.description: Fires when the active index changes (via click, keyboard, or controlled update).

props.name: readOnly
props.description: When true, disables all interaction (clicks, keyboard) and renders as a read-only live-region indicator (`role="status"`, `aria-live="polite"`). Use for components that purely mirror a parent carousel's state.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the root.

style.description: Inline styles applied to the root.
